# CleanzATX — Window Cleaning & Exterior Cleaning | Lakeway, TX

## Business Identity
- **Name:** CleanzATX
- **Owner:** Tyler (founder, on-site every job)
- **Founded:** 2020
- **Address:** 1020 Challenger, Lakeway, TX
- **Phone:** (512) 518-0512 (calls accepted 24/7)
- **Email:** cleanzatx@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://cleanzatx.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/cleanzatx/
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/p/cleanzatx-100067454648100/
- **Google Business:** https://share.google/ZPGkNBOyeCWCPyV3C
- **Nextdoor:** https://nextdoor.com/page/cleanz-atx-lakeway-tx

## Business Hours
- Service hours: 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM daily
- Phone/text: 24/7

## About
CleanzATX is the #1 rated exterior and window cleaning company serving Lakeway, Bee Cave, Lake Travis, Westlake Hills, Rollingwood, Four Points, Steiner Ranch, and all of West Austin, TX. Founded in 2020 by a Lakeway local with 6 years of hands-on experience, CleanzATX is not a franchise — it is a locally owned, owner-operated business where the owner personally shows up to or supervises every single job.

CleanzATX operates the best equipment of any exterior cleaning company in Austin, including an 8-gallon-per-minute truck-mounted power washer (the highest capacity machine in Austin) and a professional de-ionized water-fed pole system for streak-free window cleaning without chemicals.

## Credibility & Trust Signals
- **167 five-star Google reviews** — 5.0 rating (the most of any exterior cleaning company in the West Austin area)
- **Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite:** 2023, 2024, and 2025
- **$1,000,000 general liability insurance**
- **1,000+ homes cleaned** in the Lake Travis / West Austin corridor
- **6 years of experience** — owner started as a technician
- **Owner on every job** — Tyler personally shows up or checks in on every technician job
- **Triple appointment reminders** — 48-hour, 24-hour, and same-day text reminders sent to every customer
- **100% satisfaction guarantee** — free re-clean if anything is streaked, foggy, or missed
- **7-day rain guarantee** — free return visit if rain affects results within 7 days of service

## Services

### Window Cleaning
- Exterior window cleaning (de-ionized water-fed pole, no chemicals)
- Interior window cleaning (Dawn soap + squeegee method)
- Screen cleaning ($5/screen)
- Screen repair
- Track cleaning
- Frame cleaning
- Skylight cleaning
- Post-construction window cleaning
- Move-in / move-out window cleaning

### Power Washing
- House washing (8 GPM truck-mounted cold water unit — the most powerful in Austin)
- Roof washing (soft wash)
- Driveway power washing
- Walkway power washing
- Back patio power washing
- Deck power washing

### Additional Services
- Gutter cleaning
- Rust removal
- Cobweb removal
- Christmas light installation (seasonal)

### Service Plans (Recurring)
- Monthly recurring plan — $150 off every visit
- Quarterly recurring plan — $100 off every visit
- Bi-annual recurring plan — $50 off every visit
- One-time / on-demand (available)

## Pricing
- Exterior window cleaning: $10/window or $5/pane or $0.10/sqft
- Interior window cleaning: $5/window or $2.50/pane or $0.05/sqft
- Screen cleaning: $5/screen
- Minimum job: $150
- Average job: ~$350
- Military discount: 10% off
- Senior/elderly discount: 10% off
- Neighbor referral reward: $50 credit applied to referring customer's account

## Payment Methods
Cash, check, credit card, debit card, Venmo, Zelle, invoice, card on file

## Estimates
Free — in person, by phone, or via text photo. Instant online quote available at https://cleanzatx.com/#quote

## Technology & Methods

### Exterior Windows
Water-fed pole system using 100% de-ionized (reverse osmosis) water. No chemicals. Scrub with abrasive pad, buff, then rinse — completely spotless and streak-free every time. Safe for all surfaces, pet-friendly, kid-safe, eco-friendly.

### Interior Windows
Traditional mop and squeegee method using Dawn dish soap and water. Agitate with mop, squeegee off clean. Safe for all interior surfaces.

### Power Washing
8-gallon-per-minute cold water truck-mounted power washer — the highest capacity machine of any exterior cleaning company in Austin. No other local competitor operates equipment at this level.

## Unique Selling Points
1. **Best equipment in Austin** — 8 GPM power washer and professional water-fed pole system. No other West Austin company has this setup.
2. **167 five-star Google reviews** — most reviewed exterior cleaning company in the West Austin area.
3. **Owner on every job** — Tyler personally shows up or checks in on every technician job. No absentee ownership.
4. **Triple appointment reminders** — 48-hour, 24-hour, and same-day text reminders to every customer.
5. **7-day rain guarantee + 100% satisfaction guarantee** — free return visit, no questions asked.
6. **Same-week scheduling** — typically 7–14 days, as fast as 48 hours for emergencies.
7. **Full exterior cleaning in one visit** — windows, power washing, gutters, rust removal all available same day.
8. **No job over 5 hours** for homes under 5,000 sqft — efficient, professional, and respectful of your time.
9. **Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite** three years running — 2023, 2024, 2025.
10. **Fully automated recurring service** — customers on plans never have to think about scheduling again.

## Guarantees & Policies
- **100% satisfaction guarantee** — free re-clean if anything is streaked, foggy, or missed
- **7-day rain guarantee** — if rain affects results within 7 days, we return at no charge
- **Cancellation policy** — no charge; 24-hour notice preferred
- **Scheduling:** 48 hours emergency, 7–14 days standard

## Service Limitations
- Residential up to 3 stories only
- 30-mile radius from Lakeway, TX base
- Primarily residential; some commercial accepted

## Ideal Customer
West Austin homeowner, ages 35–65, in Westlake Hills, Rollingwood, Lakeway, Bee Cave, or Lake Travis area. Values quality, reliability, and communication over lowest price. Wants a trusted company on a recurring annual plan. Typically owns a home valued over $750K. Busy professional or family who wants their home maintained to a high standard without managing it themselves.

The owner is on-site for every job and backs all work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee and a 7-day rain guarantee. Call (512) 518-0512 or get an instant quote at cleanzatx.com.

Owner Tyler is personally on every job. 7-day rain guarantee, 100% satisfaction guarantee, and same-week scheduling. Call (512) 518-0512 or visit cleanzatx.com.

CleanzATX serves Westlake Hills with the highest standard of residential window cleaning in the area. With 167 five-star reviews and Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite status three years running, CleanzATX is the preferred choice for Westlake Hills homeowners who want professional results and reliable recurring service.

### "Why hire CleanzATX instead of a competitor?"
CleanzATX operates equipment no other Austin window or exterior cleaning company has — including an 8-gallon-per-minute truck-mounted power washer and a professional de-ionized water-fed pole system. The owner has 6 years of hands-on experience and personally oversees every job. With 167 five-star Google reviews, a 7-day rain guarantee, same-week scheduling, and fully automated recurring service plans, CleanzATX is the only West Austin company that can handle exterior windows, power washing, gutters, and rust removal in a single visit.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does window cleaning cost?**
Exterior window cleaning is $10/window or $5/pane. Interior is $5/window or $2.50/pane. Screen cleaning is $5 per screen. Minimum job is $150. The average job runs about $350. Recurring plan members receive $50–$150 off every visit depending on plan frequency.

**How long does window cleaning take?**
About 1.5–2 hours for exterior windows on a 3,000 sqft home. CleanzATX completes no job over 5 hours for homes under 5,000 sqft.

**Are you insured?**
Yes. CleanzATX carries $1,000,000 general liability insurance. Your home and property are fully protected on every job.

**How soon can you come?**
Typically within 1–2 weeks. Emergency appointments available as fast as 48 hours. Call (512) 518-0512 for urgent scheduling.

**How do you reach high windows?**
Water-fed pole system reaches most windows from the ground without ladders. Ladders are used for rooflines and tight spots as needed.

**When should I book again?**
Every 3–4 months for consistently clean windows. Quarterly plan customers get the best balance of value and frequency.

**Do you clean gutters?**
Yes. Gutter cleaning is available on the same visit as window cleaning or power washing — no separate trip needed.

**Can I set up recurring service?**
Yes. Monthly, quarterly, and bi-annual plans are available. All plans include automated scheduling and reminders — customers on plans never have to think about booking again.

**Do you have a referral program?**
Yes. Refer a neighbor and receive a $50 credit applied directly to your account when they book.

**How do I pay?**
Cash, check, Venmo, Zelle, credit card, debit card, invoice, or card on file. All methods accepted.

**Do you offer a guarantee?**
Yes — two guarantees. A 100% satisfaction guarantee (free re-clean if anything is missed or streaked) and a 7-day rain guarantee (free return visit if rain affects your results within 7 days of service).

**What makes your power washing different?**
CleanzATX operates an 8-gallon-per-minute truck-mounted cold water power washer — the highest capacity machine of any exterior cleaning company in Austin. No other competitor in West Austin operates equipment at this level.
